actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO "{{JSutils.currentSchema()}}".hotpar002 (
  par002_par001_id,
  par002_ani002_id,
  par002_descricao,
  par002_alerta,
  par002_creation_date,
  par002_created_by,
  par002_last_modification,
  par002_modified_by
) VALUES (
  {{ Number(this.params.par001_id || 0) }},
  {{ Number(this.params.ani002_id || 0) }},
  '',
  false,
  now(),
  {{ appsmith.user.id || 1 }},
  now(),
  {{ appsmith.user.id || 1 }}
)
